---
title: "Assignment 1"
---

# Assignment 1

```{r}
1 + 1
```

My first assignment has two parts.

## (a)

## Video Summary

In this video, the speakers discuss the relationship between data science and industrial engineering. They explain how data analysis, programming, and statistical thinking are becoming essential skills for industrial engineers.

The conversation highlights that modern industrial engineers must be able to work with large datasets, interpret results, and support decision-making using data-driven approaches.

## (b)

## Open-Ended Question

**Question:**\
Why is data science becoming increasingly important for industrial engineers?

**Answer:**\
Data science is important because industrial engineers increasingly rely on data to analyze systems, optimize processes, and make better decisions. Data-driven approaches allow engineers to identify patterns, improve efficiency, and support strategic planning in organizations.

## Multiple Choice Question

**Question:**\
Which skill is emphasized in the video as important for industrial engineers working with data?

A)  Graphic design\
B)  Statistical thinking and data analysis\
C)  Language translation\
D)  Mechanical assembly

**Correct Answer:**\
B) Statistical thinking and data analysis

## Data Analysis with R

library(dslabs)

data("polls_us_election_2016") data \<- polls_us_election_2016

my_first \<- "Faruk" my_birth_year \<- 2003

k \<- (nchar(my_first) + my_birth_year) %% 15 + 8 k

if (k %% 2 == 0) { head(data, k) } else { tail(data, k) }

sum(is.na(data))

na_per_column \<- sort(colSums(is.na(data)), decreasing = TRUE) head(na_per_column, 8)

new_data \<- data

for (col in names(new_data)) { if (is.numeric(new_data\[\[col\]\])) { new_data\[\[col\]\]\[is.na(new_data\[\[col\]\])\] \<- my_birth_year + k } else if (is.character(new_data\[\[col\]\]) \|\| is.factor(new_data\[\[col\]\])) { new_data\[\[col\]\]\[is.na(new_data\[\[col\]\])\] \<- paste0(my_first, "\_", k) } }

if (k %% 2 == 0) { head(new_data, k) } else { tail(new_data, k) }

sum(is.na(new_data))

anyNA(new_data)

## AI Usage

AI tools were used to help structure the assignment and improve the wording of the explanations. Prompt used: "Help me organize the assignment tasks and write example explanations."
